evals.name: suggests-plan-after-recording
evals.prompt: Define the spec for user authentication — login with email/password, get a JWT back, refresh tokens before they expire. That covers it. Go ahead and record the spec.
evals.expected_output: Gathers context from GOAL.md and ROADMAP.md. Defines behaviors as Given/When/Then for login, token refresh, and error cases. Records the spec (branch, commit, merge, tag). After recording is complete, suggests running /plan to create an implementation plan.

assertions.description: Reads GOAL.md and/or ROADMAP.md before defining behaviors
Defines at least two Given/When/Then behaviors for the authentication capability
Attempts to record the spec (creates branch, commits, tags) — does not skip recording
After recording, suggests /plan for implementation planning
The /plan suggestion appears AFTER the recording steps, not before or instead of recording
